title: Senior Relationship Manager
description:
Job Purpose

The primary role of the Senior Relationship Manager (RM) is to build trust and value-added relationships with key clients within the accounts they manage.  Relationship Managers are considered a key strategic point person that can speak on a strategic level with their assigned customers and represent all aspects of ICE Data Services. RM’s are measured on revenue retention and growth with the goal of strengthening and enhancing long term client relationships. 

Responsibilities

  • Responsible for managing all revenue streams across ICE Data Services’ full portfolio of products and services.
  • Accountable for maintaining and expanding the existing revenue base while proactively mitigating risks and preventing revenue erosion within assigned accounts.
  • Develop and nurture relationships across all client organization levels, including C-suite executives.
  • Lead strategic account planning and take ownership of complex contract renegotiations.
  • Identify and pursue new business opportunities, collaborating with the sales team in closing deals.
  • Service as a key coordinator of internal resources to ensure successful execution of client initiatives and effective resolution of issues.

Knowledge and Experience

  • 7+ years of experience working within the financial services industry
  • 7+ years of client relationship experience.
  • Bachelor’s degree is required.
  • Self-driven, motivated and proactive
  • A client-centric, advisory type mentality (as opposed to purely transactional account management)
  • Business and financial written and verbal communication skills in English

postedCompany.description:
Make the connection to data, expertise and technology that create opportunity and inspire innovation


No matter what you think ICE does, we do more. We operate the world’s largest stock exchange and global markets. We improve risk management. We are a leader in fixed income and data services. We’re digitizing the mortgage industry. And that’s just the beginning. 


We approach every challenge as an opportunity to connect. People with data. Markets with transparency. Industries with technology. In our world, innovation begins with connection.


Data

The high quality, and breadth and depth of our data, enables our clients to access insights and capitalize on opportunities.


Technology

Our leading platforms and cutting-edge technology enable people to connect with each other, trade, settle, analyze and deliver results.


Expertise

Our decades of experience enable us to build custom solutions from extensive data sets and proprietary technology to solve business challenges.
